final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (WeChat Official Account article cover) for a fragrance new product launch campaign titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: high-end editorial flat design, refined luxury aesthetic with subtle texture, inspired by Japanese fragrance brand visual identity
Composition: centered composition, title text as the dominant focal element, generous negative space framing the center, balanced symmetry
Subject: prominent display of the headline "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the visual anchor, supported by minimal decorative motifs evoking autumn — dried leaves, ink wash accents, or delicate botanical silhouettes
Scene/backdrop: soft warm-toned background suggesting autumn atmosphere — muted amber, dusty rose, or deep ochre gradient wash
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light, warm and still, evoking nostalgia and quiet luxury
Color palette: warm autumn tones — amber, burnt sienna, and ivory as base; deep ink or charcoal for text contrast; one muted gold accent
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain or linen texture on background, refined ink-like strokes for decorative elements
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be the largest and most legible element; layout must work at 900×500 horizontal banner ratio; no clutter around the headline
Avoid: generic stock photo look, over-saturated colors, busy backgrounds, drop shadows on text, watermarks, clipart autumn leaves
